question: Do the selected strings reach target open pitches at playable tension?
next_action: Install candidate strings and tune under documented qianjin-to-bridge length
evidence_required: Tuner readings string package gauge and ambient notes
notes: Do not publish tension claims until measured

question: Is the qianjin-to-bridge speaking length stable and repeatable?
next_action: Measure contact point to contact point after qianjin and bridge placement
evidence_required: Photo or sketch plus measured distance and setup notes
notes: Governing length is qianjin-to-bridge not violin scale

question: Does the bow speak cleanly on both strings?
next_action: Run slow bow starts crossings and dynamic response notes
evidence_required: Audio or written trial log with bow hair and rosin details
notes: Record scratchiness choking and string balance

question: Does the membrane support bridge load and desired response?
next_action: Test membrane candidate under bridge load and humidity notes
evidence_required: Deflection observations tone notes and failure or creep log
notes: Stop if tearing slipping or excessive damping occurs

question: Have measurements been promoted into authoritative drawings only after validation?
next_action: Update future CAD DXF or design table from measured passing setup
evidence_required: Diff or drawing revision linked to validation evidence
